name: MoreCAPTCHA
description: Speeds up solving Google reCAPTCHA challenges by shortening transition effects and providing continuous selection ability.

name: FMHY Base64 Auto Decoder
description: Decode base64-encoded links in some pastebins and make URLs clickable

name: Anti adblock detector
description: Removes most (not all) adblock detectors that ask you to disable your ad blocking extension.

name: YT Playlist Cleaner
description: A handy tool to tidy up your YouTube playlists with custom settings and smart features

name: Youtube RSS Feed
description: Adds an RSS feed button to YouTube channels next to the subscribe button
